query: SELECT id, title, due_week FROM bambina_checklist WHERE title LIKE '%Mindful%' OR title LIKE '%Weekly scan%' ORDER BY due_week;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RXsnsHaxFXFzWXK.root --database TGNsMbsGdWXQhRmCtYbG6q --execute SELECT id, title, due_week FROM bambina_checklist WHERE title LIKE '%Mindful%' OR title LIKE '%Weekly scan%' ORDER BY due_week;
